arts.ttl: Chelsea receive clear Jhon Duran transfer message after £40m deal and contract talks
arts.sum: In-demand Aston Villa striker Jhon Duran has admitted he is enjoying his current battle with Ollie Watkins - as insisted he loves life at Villa Park despite nearly joining Chelsea in the summer. Chelsea tried to sign Duran from Villa earlier this year, with the Blues allowed to discuss personal terms with the player .

arts.ttl: FC Astana vs Chelsea – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Chelsea travel to Kazakhstan to face FC Astana in the Europa Conference League this afternoon in what is the Blues’ furthest-ever European away trip. The West Londoners currently top the league phase after collecting maximum points from their opening four games. arts.sum: Callum Hudson-Odoi came through the Chelsea academy at a time when the west London club were brimming with talent. Indeed, that crop of Chelsea youngsters...

arts.ttl: “Fascinating” Enzo Maresca has Chelsea in title race and “hard to argue against” Blues being a better project than Arsenal
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca certainly seems to be succeeding at Chelsea where Messrs. Potter, Lampard and Pochettino failed, with the Blues absolutely in the Premier League title race this season. There’s a togetherness about the team in 24/25 which hasn’t been notable before, and the manager has to be given credit for that. arts.sum: Chelsea’s first-team star is attracting interest from Premier League giants Manchester City and Liverpool. The Chelsea squad is stacked with so many talented young players...

arts.sum: It seems there were concrete talks over Levi Colwill potentially leaving Chelsea for a surprise transfer to Bayern Munich in the summer. arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca gets green light for January transfer as Chelsea exit route emerges
arts.sum: The 21-year-old, who incidentally spent part of last season on loan with Enzo Maresca at Leicester City, has yet to feature for Chelsea in the Premier League this season. The report adds that Monza are hoping to have Casedei registered as soon as the window opens on January 2 - so that he can play against Cagliari three days later.
